name: Sauteed Chicken in Lemon Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dry Vermouth or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a mallet, lightly pound the chicken between sheets of plastic wrap to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
2. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken to the skillet and sauté just until cooked through, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer the chicken to a platter and cover with foil, keeping warm.
5. Add vermouth, lemon juice, and lemon peel to the skillet; boil for 1 minute, scraping up any browned bits.
6. Add cream, broth, and any juices accumulated from the chicken; boil until reduced to sauce consistency, about 8 minutes.
7. Mix in 1/4 cup Parmesan. Season the sauce with salt and pepper.
8. Pour the sauce around the chicken. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup Parmesan and parsley and serve with egg noodles.
